content:
Hello hello i'm the person who writing "poison have problem", and you know what? I'll do it again! 

In anticipation of the release of the new skin for 24, i want to again raise the topic of poison and how she feels in it

24 in the aqua realm (her strongest realm according to many) is no longer a strong poison unit, she is still able to go through the entire normal and HM story without OE (E3 80 lvl) but straggle in long fights or fights against a boss that summons mobs that protect him from damage with their bodies 

Gdoll can solve this problem, she applies a good amount of poison and can also increase our damage + application, but here's the problem, for this you need OE, then gmurphy came out, which gave a free dmg amp cuz blue + chaos team

A little too much for it to work and AT LEAST be on the same level as Liz / Daff, those who just need OE and supports that will give them the opportunity to live longer / str stack

And now we here. Xu released, nymph start breathing again, Liz/Daff+ Xu can speedruning bosses(W5A5), nymph can trigger 170%+ poison from exalt, Xu buff her infliction, and only 24 sit and crying in corner she over scaled again <:takenotes:1357186646294138890> (Now even nymph can apply more poison than 24)

I understand 24 is not carry, she support, i agree with that but what about REAL poison carry? Or we still continued release more and more poison support who play with support on W3 <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
这几天时不时就会出现这种情况，想要推进就只能跳过剧情………
